title: org.cispec label set
description: JSON Schema for the org.cispec Change Item attribution namespace v1.0. Validates a flat key-value map of org.cispec.* labels applied to any Change Item. 51 terms across identity, registry, financial, lifecycle, custody, and CI-type-specific categories. Canonical governance: https://cispec.org/ Validation toolkit: https://cimatrix.org/

labels.description: Flat map of org.cispec.* label keys to string values.

org.cispec.organization.description: Owning organisation slug. X.500/X.520 organizationName (O). REQUIRED.

org.cispec.orgunit.description: Organisational unit slug. X.500/X.520 organizationalUnitName (OU). REQUIRED.

org.cispec.owner.description: Accountable individual or role. Email, GPG-key-ID@domain, or role:identity. REQUIRED.

org.cispec.role.description: Operational role this CI instance is fulfilling. Universal — any CI type. REQUIRED.

org.cispec.application.description: Designed purpose or applied function. Universal — software, hardware, pharmaceutical, weapon system, etc. REQUIRED.

org.cispec.oid.description: Relational pointer to the CLIENT's own OID arc. Not DPS's 42387 arc.

org.cispec.duns.description: D&B DUNS in OID notation: iso.org.duns.<9-digit-number>. Externally verifiable.

org.cispec.customer.description: Customer identifier in the owning organisation's billing scheme.

org.cispec.costcenter.description: Cost centre identifier in the owning organisation's accounting scheme.

org.cispec.cost.description: Acquisition cost or last known price. Format: amount:currency[:type].

org.cispec.depreciation.description: Depreciation method and useful life. Format: method:period.

org.cispec.contract-ref.description: Procurement vehicle pointer: contract number, GSA schedule ref, PO number.

org.cispec.usage.description: Quantity consumed in billing period. Format: quantity:unit.

org.cispec.vendor.description: Who sells or services the CI to the org. Distinct from manufacturer (producer).

org.cispec.version.description: Semver 2.0 version. Universal — software, firmware, document, policy. REQUIRED.

org.cispec.specversion.description: Spec version labels were authored against.

org.cispec.environment.description: Operational programme, zone, or tier the CI is assigned to. Bare slug or purdue-level:<n> for ICS.

org.cispec.expiry.description: When the CI expires, EOLs, or requires renewal. ISO 8601 date.

org.cispec.acquired.description: When the CI entered the org's inventory. ISO 8601 date.

org.cispec.custody-chain.description: Bare pointer to the chronological custody record — case ID, hash, or URI.

org.cispec.checksum.description: Cryptographic hash. Format: algorithm:hexdigest. REQUIRED for evidence CIs at collection time.

org.cispec.asset-tag.description: Inventory control number assigned by the owning org. Distinct from serial-number (OEM-assigned).

org.cispec.serial-number.description: OEM-assigned serial number. Globally unique within a manufacturer.

org.cispec.manufacturer.description: Who produces the CI. Distinct from vendor (who sells/services it) and owner (who owns it).

org.cispec.make.description: Product line or brand within a manufacturer's catalogue.

org.cispec.model.description: Specific variant or SKU. Applies to hardware and AI/LLM models alike.

org.cispec.ip-address.description: Primary management or operational IP address. IPv4, IPv6, or CIDR.

org.cispec.mac-address.description: Hardware MAC address. IEEE 802 colon-separated lower-case hex.

org.cispec.fqdn.description: Fully-qualified domain name. DNS-resolvable; distinct from commonname and ip-address.

org.cispec.collection-method.description: How the CI was acquired or collected.

org.cispec.assurance-level.description: Identity or authentication assurance level. Format: framework:level.

org.cispec.facility-class.description: Facility tier or class. Format: framework:class.

org.cispec.contract-type.description: Contract category when the contract is itself the CI being tracked.

org.cispec.counterparty.description: Other party to the agreement when a contract is the CI.

org.cispec.location.description: Where the CI physically is. Distinct from environment (programme assignment).

org.cispec.classification.description: What the CI is certified, cleared, or regulated as. Cross-domain: ts/sci, phi, pci-cde, dal:a, cui.

org.cispec.exposure.description: Public accessibility posture. public=internet-reachable, restricted=authenticated external, private=internal only.

org.cispec.scan-policy.description: EXPERIMENTAL. Scanning policy: included:authenticated, included:unauthenticated, excluded:air-gapped, excluded:exempt.

org.cispec.config-baseline.description: EXPERIMENTAL. Configuration baseline reference pointer: DISA-STIG-RHEL9-v1r1, CIS-Ubuntu22-L2-v1.0.0, URI.

org.cispec.sla.description: Service level agreement or maintenance commitment pointer.

org.cispec.commonname.description: Human-recognizable name. X.509 CN lineage. Distinct from asset-tag (inventory number).

additionalProperties.description: Extension terms under org.cispec.*. Must resolve at a public TLS-verified domain per https://cispec.org/#minting-new-terms

slug.description: Lower-case alphanumeric slug with hyphens; no leading or trailing hyphen.

identity.description: Email, GPG-key-ID@domain, or role:identity colon-qualified form.

oid-string.description: OID in dotted-decimal or iso.* human-readable form.

duns-string.description: D&B DUNS in OID notation: iso.org.duns.<9-digit-number>.

allOf.description: Declared conformance: required core keys must be present.
